description_long: This is a standard-sized basketball with a textured, pebbled brown rubber surface and deep black seams dividing the ball into traditional panels. The ball shows visible signs of wear, including faded markings and scuffing, suggesting frequent use on outdoor courts or urban environments. The surface is matte with a grippy tactile quality, designed to enhance handling and control during play. Faint black printed graphics and a partially visible Nike Swoosh logo are present on one side, though some of the branding is worn and difficult to read. The ball appears to be fully inflated, maintaining a spherical shape with no visible deformation. No inflation valve is visible in the provided views.
description: A well-used brown basketball with a pebbled, grippy surface, black seams, and faded Nike branding. The ball shows scuff marks and signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: This view shows the basketball's brown, textured surface with prominent black seams and some faded markings on the right side.
description_view_1: The Nike Swoosh logo and partial text are visible on the right, with the ball's pebbled texture and seams clearly defined.
description_view_2: The ball's surface appears uniformly worn, with less visible branding and consistent scuff marks across the panels.
description_view_3: A large, faded black marking is visible on the left, with the seams and pebbled texture prominent; branding is partially obscured.
attribute_brand_logo: Nike Swoosh logo, partially visible on the right side in view 1
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with deep black seams forming traditional basketball grooves
attribute_visible_wear_or_graffiti: Faded markings, scuff marks, and general surface wear visible across all views, especially near branding
